question: Does lupus take years to diagnose because doctors don't understand it?
topic: Misunderstanding why lupus diagnosis is difficult creates harmful mistrust and unrealistic expectati

discovery_sources.text: Lupus diagnosis currently takes months to years; previously took 2-3 years to diagnose (improved from past decade)
